title: Onboarding a client to your firm

captions.text: The firm portal shows every client engagement in one place.
Client Management lists your clients with their TIN and VAT status.
Onboarding starts with business identity: name, TIN, and industry.
VAT registration is recorded explicitly - answered, never assumed.
Contact and address details complete the client record.
The engagement type defines what your firm does for this client.
Only firm owners can add clients.
The new client appears immediately, ready for transactions and filings.
